problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
